domain: Knowledge Graph Integration for SLM Reasoning

feature_gaps.title: KG-to-SLM Knowledge Distillation Toolkit
feature_gaps.description: No existing tool provides an end-to-end pipeline for distilling knowledge graph structure and relationships into compact SLM weights. Current distillation research (KG-MASD) is purely academic with no usable library. Developers must manually design teacher-student pipelines combining KG embeddings with model compression.
feature_gaps.who_needs_it: ML engineers deploying KG-augmented reasoning on edge devices
feature_gaps.evidence: 0 out of 13 tools support knowledge distillation

feature_gaps.title: GNN-Enhanced SLM Reasoning Framework
feature_gaps.description: GNN-RAG demonstrated that GNNs can help 7B models match GPT-4 on KGQA, but there is no production-ready framework that integrates GNN subgraph reasoning with SLMs (<3B). Current GNN-RAG is research code only, not a reusable library.
feature_gaps.who_needs_it: Developers building knowledge-grounded chatbots with small models
feature_gaps.evidence: Only 1/13 tools has GNN integration, and it's research-only

feature_gaps.title: Quantized KG-Augmented SLM Inference Engine
feature_gaps.description: No tool combines quantized SLM inference (GGUF/GPTQ/AWQ) with knowledge graph retrieval in a single optimized pipeline. Users must manually wire llama.cpp or similar with a separate KG retrieval layer, losing optimization opportunities.
feature_gaps.who_needs_it: Developers building on-device or low-resource KG-augmented reasoning
feature_gaps.evidence: Only 1/13 tools mentions quantization support, none integrate it natively

feature_gaps.title: Temporal Knowledge Graph Support for SLMs
feature_gaps.description: Graphiti provides temporal KG but requires large LLMs. No temporal KG solution exists that works natively with SLMs. Edge-deployed models need to reason about time-evolving facts without cloud LLM calls.
current_alternatives: Manual temporal logic on top of MiniRAG
feature_gaps.who_needs_it: IoT/edge applications needing temporal reasoning with constrained compute
feature_gaps.evidence: 2/13 tools have temporal awareness, 0 combine it with SLM support

segment_gaps.title: Domain-Specific KG+SLM Vertical Solutions
segment_gaps.description: No tool provides pre-built domain-specific knowledge graphs (medical, legal, financial) optimized for SLM consumption. Enterprises need turnkey KG+SLM solutions for specific verticals rather than general-purpose frameworks requiring extensive customization.
current_alternatives: Custom builds using Neo4j + fine-tuned models
segment_gaps.who_needs_it: Healthcare, legal, and financial companies with compliance constraints requiring on-premise SLMs
segment_gaps.evidence: All tools are general-purpose; no vertical-specific KG+SLM solution

segment_gaps.title: Mobile/Embedded KG-Reasoning SDK
segment_gaps.description: MiniRAG targets edge but focuses on retrieval, not deep graph reasoning. No SDK exists for mobile (iOS/Android) or embedded (ARM) deployment that combines compact KG storage with SLM inference in a single binary/library.
segment_gaps.who_needs_it: Mobile app developers, robotics engineers, automotive AI teams
segment_gaps.evidence: Only 2/13 tools target edge deployment, none provide mobile SDKs

segment_gaps.title: Educational/Tutoring KG-SLM Platform
segment_gaps.description: No platform combines curriculum knowledge graphs with SLM-based tutoring that can run locally in schools/environments with limited connectivity. Educational KGs exist but are not integrated with efficient reasoning models.
segment_gaps.who_needs_it: EdTech companies, schools in low-connectivity areas
segment_gaps.evidence: No tools in landscape target education vertical

workflow_gaps.title: End-to-End KG Construction + SLM Fine-Tuning Pipeline
workflow_gaps.description: No tool provides a unified pipeline from raw documents -> KG construction -> training data generation -> SLM fine-tuning -> deployment. Users must stitch together 4-5 different tools (document parsers, KG builders, training frameworks, inference engines).
current_alternatives: Manual pipeline: LlamaIndex KG + HuggingFace training + llama.cpp deployment
workflow_gaps.evidence: No tool covers the full lifecycle from KG construction through model training to deployment

workflow_gaps.title: KG-Guided Prompt Optimization for SLMs
workflow_gaps.description: KG Structure as Prompt is research-only. No production tool automatically converts KG topology (metapaths, neighbor structures, subgraph patterns) into optimized prompts specifically designed for SLM token budgets and attention patterns.
workflow_gaps.who_needs_it: Prompt engineers working with constrained-context SLMs
workflow_gaps.evidence: Research shows KG structural prompts help SLMs, but no tool automates this

workflow_gaps.title: Automated KG Quality Evaluation for SLM Consumption
workflow_gaps.description: No tool evaluates whether a knowledge graph is 'SLM-ready' - measuring properties like average path length, entity density, relationship clarity that impact SLM reasoning quality. Current KG quality tools don't account for SLM-specific constraints.
workflow_gaps.who_needs_it: Data engineers preparing KGs for SLM integration
workflow_gaps.evidence: No tool evaluates KG quality from SLM consumption perspective

integration_gaps.title: Unified Graph DB Adapter for SLM Frameworks
integration_gaps.description: MiniRAG supports 10+ graph DBs but with basic integration. No adapter provides optimized, SLM-aware query planning across graph databases - translating SLM reasoning needs into efficient graph traversal patterns for different backends.
integration_gaps.who_needs_it: Teams with existing graph infrastructure wanting to add SLM reasoning
integration_gaps.evidence: Graph DB support exists but without SLM-specific query optimization

integration_gaps.title: KG-SLM Integration for Agentic Workflows
integration_gaps.description: Agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen) lack native KG-backed reasoning for SLMs. Graphiti serves agents but requires large LLMs. No solution provides persistent KG memory for SLM-powered agents.
integration_gaps.evidence: Agent frameworks growing rapidly but KG+SLM agent integration is missing

pricing_gaps.title: Open-Source SLM+KG Managed Service
pricing_gaps.description: Neo4j AuraDB and Zep Cloud exist but are priced for enterprise LLM use cases. No affordable managed service targets the SLM use case where inference costs are low but KG hosting/management is the bottleneck.
pricing_gaps.who_needs_it: Startups and indie developers using SLMs to keep costs low
pricing_gaps.evidence: SLM adoption driven by cost; KG hosting remains expensive barrier

pricing_gaps.title: Serverless KG-Augmented SLM Inference
pricing_gaps.description: No serverless/pay-per-query option exists for KG-augmented SLM inference. Current solutions require persistent graph DB instances even for sporadic usage patterns.
pricing_gaps.who_needs_it: Developers with variable workloads who want KG reasoning without fixed infrastructure costs
pricing_gaps.evidence: No serverless KG+SLM offering in market

pricing_gaps.title: Embedded KG File Format for Offline SLM Reasoning
pricing_gaps.description: No standardized file format exists for packaging a knowledge graph in a compact, query-efficient format that can be loaded alongside a quantized SLM for fully offline reasoning. Like GGUF for models, but for KGs.
pricing_gaps.who_needs_it: Offline-first application developers, field workers, military/air-gapped environments
pricing_gaps.evidence: GGUF standardized model distribution; no equivalent for KGs paired with SLMs
